description: F0RT1KA Elasticsearch Registry - Maps ES profile names to endpoints for direct test result export

metadata.purpose: Direct Elasticsearch export from test orchestrator binaries
notes: Copy this file to elasticsearch-registry.json and configure with real endpoints
API keys are stored in environment variables, NOT in this file
Set the appropriate env var (e.g., F0_ES_PROD_APIKEY) before building
Use --es <profile> flag with build_all.sh to enable ES export
If no --es flag is provided, tests will NOT export to ES (backward compatible)
